name: golang-github-gophercloud-utils-dev
title: golang-github-gophercloud-utils-dev
description:
utils for OpenStack Go library
Gophercloud is an OpenStack Go SDK, this library provides extra utils
to use gophercloud.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-gophercloud-utils-dev because utils for OpenStack Go library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-gophercloud-utils-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-gophercloud-utils-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-gophercloud-utils-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
